title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout is a cloud cost management platform trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz and Lyft. Reporting to the CRO, the Head of Revenue Operations will build and scale the operational backbone of the GTM engine. Requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and a leader-doer mindset comfortable owning executive strategy while building flows, dashboards and data models across distributed teams.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps, proven expertise in Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and GTM scaling align perfectly with Finout's need to build operational infrastructure at scale. The Head of Revenue Operations role reporting to CRO is exactly his target profile, and Tel Aviv/hybrid is ideal for his location preferences.
ai_opener: Finout's mission to bring financial clarity to cloud spend resonates—especially given the operational complexity of scaling GTM across distributed teams. With 15+ years scaling RevOps foundations in high-growth B2B SaaS environments, including deep Salesforce and revenue analytics expertise, I've built the exact operational backbone you're looking for. I'd love to explore how we can turn Finout's momentum (NYT, Wiz, Lyft as anchors) into a predictable, data-driven revenue engine.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Platomics is a healthcare/diagnostics SaaS company. As Revenue Operations Manager you'll be the backbone of the revenue engine, designing, optimizing and documenting workflows across sales, marketing and customer success to ensure alignment and data-driven decisions. Responsibilities include building dashboards, analyzing funnel metrics, administering the CRM (HubSpot) and other RevOps tools, and supporting forecasting, territory planning and quota setting. Certifications in Salesforce, HubSpot or RevOps (e.g., RevOps Co-op) and Agile/Waterfall project management experience preferred. Remote-flexible across Europe with competitive salary.
score_reason: Strong alignment with core RevOps competencies (HubSpot admin, pipeline forecasting, funnel optimization, cross-functional alignment). Healthcare SaaS is a solid adjacent vertical, though not fintech/AI-native. Remote-flexible Europe works geographically.

With 15+ years optimizing GTM operations in B2B SaaS and deep hands-on experience with HubSpot administration, forecasting, and cross-functional workflow design, I'd be excited to explore how I can help you turn data into competitive advantage in healthcare SaaS.

title: RevOps Expert

ai_opener: Omri, I came across Remote's RevOps Expert role and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years optimizing revenue operations and GTM systems in B2B SaaS aligns perfectly with their mission to scale global employment infrastructure. The role emphasizes exactly what you excel at: Salesforce architecture, multi-tool integration (HubSpot, LeanData, Vitally), and data governance for hypergrowth companies. I'd love to explore whether this fully remote opportunity matches your next chapter.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
